headline: A Look At Charles River Laboratories (CRL) Valuation After 2026 Guidance Cut And Planned Divestitures
summary: Charles River Laboratories International (CRL) recently lowered its 2026 earnings guidance to reflect planned divestitures that are expected to trim reported revenue by slightly more than US$200 million, which is a meaningful update for shareholders. See our latest analysis for Charles River Laboratories International. The revised 2026 earnings guidance and planned divestitures come after a softer period for the stock, with a 30 day share price return of 7.8% and a year to date share price...
